view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Payment links per participant' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking steps.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Payment links per participant' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking steps.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that multiple customers can book the same offer, and their payment statuses are tracked individually. Specifically, the 'customer-book-primary' step shows a confirmed booking for one customer, while the 'customer-two-concurrent' step demonstrates another confirmed booking for a different customer. This indicates that the system maintains separate payment statuses for each participant in a shared booking, fulfilling the requirement for payment links per participant.
